name: Favorite Mustard Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pickling ingredients by breaking the cauliflower into bite-sized florets.
2. Peel the pearl onions.
3. Mix together 2 cups of pickling salt, 8 cups of sugar, 8 cups of cider vinegar, 1 1/2 cups of unbleached flour, 1/2 cup of dry mustard, 3 tablespoons of ground turmeric, and 2 tablespoons of celery salt in a large bowl.
4. Slice the cucumbers, onions, and red peppers into uniform pieces for even pickling.
5. Pack the vegetables tightly into sterilized jars, leaving about an inch of headspace at the top.
6. Pour the prepared brine over the vegetables, ensuring they are completely submerged.
7. Seal the jars tightly with lids.
8. Allow the jars to cool undisturbed at room temperature for 24 hours.
9. Store the pickles in a cool, dark place until ready to serve.
